name: OpenClaw Evolution OS
description: Host integration adapter for agent-evolution-os runtime hooks.

evolutionReviewBin.description: Command used to run evolution-review. Defaults to evolution-review on PATH.

autoBeforeTask.description: Run before-task automatically from the agent_turn_prepare hook. Default false.

autoAfterTask.description: Run after-task automatically from the agent_end hook. Default false.

useBeforePromptBuildFallback.description: Also register before_prompt_build as a fallback prepare hook. Usually not needed because agent_turn_prepare is earlier and more precise.

writeCandidate.description: Allow after-task to write safe candidates. High-risk writes remain blocked.
